---

created_at: 2026-03-02T18:21:00Z
send_state: draft
to:
  - claudia@helios-tax.example
subject: Resending invoice INV-0010 (2026-03-23)
attachments:
  - 50_finance/invoices/2026_03_23__eur_000780__inv_0010__helios_checklist_pack_invoice.md
---
Hi Claudia,

Resending the requested invoice from 2026-03-23 (INV-0010) for your internal approval.

Best,
Miles

function.message: Processed the oldest inbox message by preparing an outbound draft email to Claudia Reiter at her canonical address with the requested Helios invoice dated 2026-03-23 attached, then removed the processed inbox item.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed mandatory bootstrap (tree/read AGENTS/context), inspected 99_system and inbox workflows, treated inbox frontmatter as canonical transport metadata, verified sender against cast primary_contact_email, created outbox record per sending-email workflow, then deleted processed inbox file per inbox process workflow.
function.outcome_justification: Evidence showed a legitimate invoice resend request from claudia@helios-tax.example in /00_inbox/000_invoice-request.md, matching canonical primary_contact_email in /10_entities/cast/claudia.md. Requested invoice exists at /50_finance/invoices/2026_03_23__eur_000780__inv_0010__helios_checklist_pack_invoice.md.
